title: leonohebe armstrongii
intro: Leonohebe armstrongii, also known as the New Zealand native Leonohebe, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Oleariaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Leonohebe armstrongii include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce inflammation, and soothe sore throats. Leonohebe armstrongii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional New Zealand medicine.
